name: Azure Event Hubs Monitor
description: Monitor an Azure Event Hub for new events and trigger jobs when events are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new events are detected in the monitored Event Hub partitions

outputs.description: Passes event information (eventhub_name, partition_id, sequence_number, offset, enqueued_time, body) to triggered jobs via run_config

eventhub_name.label: Event Hub Name
eventhub_name.description: Name of the Event Hub to monitor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when events are detected

fully_qualified_namespace.label: Fully Qualified Namespace
fully_qualified_namespace.description: Event Hubs namespace hostname. Required when not using a connection string.

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Event Hubs connection string. If not provided, DefaultAzureCredential is used.

max_events_per_partition.label: Max Events Per Partition
max_events_per_partition.description: Maximum number of events to read per partition per evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
